name: codex-coordinator
description: Coordinate parallel Codex tasks in one shared checkout with a small active-only boundary board.

interface.shortDescription: Keep parallel Codex tasks from crossing wires
interface.longDescription: When asked, a goal-scoped Coordinator assigns two or three complete Codex task lanes in the current shared checkout. Each writer publishes only its active goal, paths, and exclusive actions so planned overlap is visible without an always-on manager, heartbeat, transcript mirror, extra worktree, or required pull-request workflow.
defaultPrompt: Coordinate this goal across complete task lanes in the current shared checkout
Show the active task boundaries in this repository
Claim this task's bounded paths before making changes
